thesis_profile.market_mechanism: v96-B only-add isolation experiment. Single-variable test versus v94 (xs_minimal_v9): ADD stress_liq_conc_iv at -0.11 (matching v95's IC-proportional weight for this factor), keep ALL 10 v94 weights UNCHANGED. Tests the second half of v95's causal decomposition. v95 cycle showed -0.28 WF sharpe regression vs v94. v96-A (drop 4 weak only) confirmed -0.155 of that regression came from removing weak factors. v96-B (this) confirms or refutes whether the remaining -0.125 came from stress_liq_conc_iv coverage NaN-fill noise. Hypothesis: stress_liq_conc_iv has only n=715 valid days (CoinGlass intraday data starts mid-2024 vs panel from 2023-04), ~400 days NaN-fillna(0); per-window IC diagnostic looks stable (-0.064, sign 89%) only because diagnostic skips NaN windows; portfolio behavior across full panel degraded. Expected v96-B WF sharpe ~0.83 (v94 0.955 - 0.125) if coverage hypothesis confirmed. v93 multiplier overlay preserved.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank top-3 liquid perp-covered names by 11 z-score factors (v94 10 + stress_liq_conc_iv added at -0.11), then scale all positions by DVOL regime multiplier. Coverage hypothesis confirmed if WF median sharpe drops to ~0.83 (v94 0.955 - 0.125 expected from causal decomposition). Coverage hypothesis refuted if WF sharpe stays ~0.95 (then v95 regression was interaction effect, not separable). Falsification triggers v96-B rejection if WF sharpe < 0.75 (worse than v95's already-rolled-back 0.675); this would indicate stress_liq_conc_iv is even more harmful in combination than alone, suggesting NaN-fill issue is severe.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_20) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.11*z(dh_60) +0.10*z(dh_5) +0.13*z(dh_20) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) -0.11*z(stress_liq_conc_iv); final = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); position_multiplier_overlay = clip(1 - tanh((max(btc_dvol_z90, eth_dvol_z90) - 0.5) * 3), 0.2, 1.0) applied at portfolio sizing layer (not in raw_score)
